principle: Show at least three product images from different angles plus one in-use shot — buyers cannot touch online products and image quantity directly correlates with purchase confidence
explanation: X.ux|product_images: single_front_image: buyer_cannot_assess_product_fully -> uncertainty -> no_purchase; minimum_set: front+side+back+detail_closeup+in_use_context; image_quality: minimum_1000x1000px(enables_zoom); zoom: enable_on_desktop(hover)+pinch_on_mobile; gallery: swipeable_on_mobile+thumbnail_row_on_desktop; video: one_short_demo_video_outperforms_5_static_images; NO:single_product_photo NO:no_zoom_capability; eg: one_front_shot >> 5_angles+zoom+context_photo

principle: Display add-to-cart confirmation without leaving the product page — sending users to the cart on every add interrupts browsing and reduces average order value
explanation: X.ux|add_to_cart_ux: redirect_to_cart_on_add: stops_browsing_session -> customer_buys_one_item_and_checks_out; better: mini_cart_drawer_slides_in+"View_cart"_button+"Continue_shopping" -> browsing_continues; cart_icon: badge_updates_with_count; add_feedback: button_morphs_to_checkmark_300ms+returns_to_original; NO:full_page_redirect_on_add_to_cart NO:no_feedback_on_add; eg: redirect_to_/cart >> drawer_mini_cart_with_continue_shopping

principle: Show size, color, and variant selectors as visual controls not dropdown text lists — dropdown-based variant selection adds an interaction layer and hides options that images would convey instantly
explanation: X.ux|variant_selectors: text_dropdown_for_color: hides_options+requires_extra_interaction; visual_controls: color_swatches(circular+border_on_selected)+size_buttons_in_row; unavailable_variants: show_with_strikethrough_NOT_hidden(helps_users_know_out_of_stock_vs_nonexistent); selected_state: clear_outline+scale_1.1; image_swap: changing_variant_updates_main_product_image; NO:dropdown_for_color_selection NO:hiding_out-of-stock_variants; eg: color_dropdown >> circular_swatches_with_hover_tooltip

principle: Place the buy button above the fold on mobile product pages — price, primary image, variant selector, and add-to-cart must all be visible before scrolling
explanation: X.ux|mobile_atf_product: above_fold_mobile_pdp: product_name+price+primary_image+variant_selector+add_to_cart; if_these_dont_fit: stack_vertically+reduce_image_height+use_fixed_sticky_bottom_bar_for_CTA; sticky_CTA: add_to_cart_as_sticky_bottom_button_on_mobile; no_sticky: CTA_disappears_on_scroll_down -> conversion_loss; NO:buy_button_only_after_description NO:image_so_large_CTA_is_below_fold; eg: full_image+full_description_before_CTA >> image(50vh)+price+variant+CTA_above_fold

principle: Show total cost including shipping and tax before checkout — surprise fees at checkout are the top reported reason for cart abandonment
explanation: X.ux|price_transparency: shipping+tax_revealed_at_checkout: Baymard_research: unexpected_extra_costs == #1_cart_abandonment_cause; fix: show_shipping_estimate_on_product_page("Ships_free_over_$50")+show_tax_in_cart; free_shipping_threshold: display_progress_bar("Add_$12_more_for_free_shipping"); NO:hiding_shipping_cost_until_checkout NO:tax_reveal_on_final_step; eg: "Price: $29" then_checkout_shows_$38 >> "$29 + est_$4_shipping"_visible_in_cart

principle: Show product reviews with a rating distribution histogram — overall star score alone does not help users evaluate product fit; seeing the distribution of 1-star vs 5-star reviews builds calibrated trust
explanation: X.ux|reviews_histogram: single_average_star: hides_bimodal_distribution(people_love_it_OR_hate_it); histogram: bar_chart_showing_%_of_each_star_rating + total_count + verified_badge; filter_by_star: let_users_read_1-star_reviews_specifically; sort: by_recency+by_relevance; photos_in_reviews: most_impactful_trust_signal; NO:reviews_hidden_below_fold NO:average_only_without_distribution; eg: "4.2 stars (847)" only >> rating_histogram+filter+photo_reviews

principle: Use a multi-step checkout with a progress indicator — single-page checkouts increase perceived complexity, and users who see how many steps remain are less likely to abandon
explanation: X.ux|checkout_steps: single_page_checkout: all_fields_visible -> overwhelming+intimidating; multi_step: Cart > Shipping > Payment > Confirm -> each_step_small_and_focused; progress_indicator: step_numbers_or_breadcrumb_at_top; back_navigation: allow_editing_previous_steps; guest_checkout: offer_before_account_creation; autofill: enable_on_all_fields; NO:forcing_account_creation_before_payment NO:checkout_with_no_progress_indicator; eg: one_page_all_fields >> 3-step_with_progress+guest_option

principle: Surface cross-sells after add-to-cart, not on the product page — cross-sell placement on the product page distracts from the primary purchase decision and reduces conversion on the original item
explanation: X.ux|crosssell_placement: cross_sell_on_PDP: competes_for_attention+creates_doubt_about_choice; correct_placement: (1)in_mini_cart_drawer_after_add_to_cart (2)on_cart_page (3)in_post-purchase_email; types: "Frequently_bought_together"+"You_may_also_like"; max_items: 3-4(more_creates_decision_paralysis); NO:cross_sells_above_the_fold_on_product_page NO:10+_recommendations_on_cart_page; eg: sidebar_recommendations_on_PDP >> "People_also_bought"_in_cart_drawer
